title: Amtech A0200B Magnetic Stubby Hammer 10oz Mini Hammer with Cushion Grip, Claw Hammer, Perfect for Pulling Nails, Silver, Black, 14.5cm x 21.5cm x 3.5cm
features: MAGNETIC HEAD: This stubby claw hammer is made from drop forged steel and has a magnetic, heat treated head for starting nails easily
COMFORTABLE: The hammer is fitted with a comfortable soft-grip handle
COMPACT DESIGN: Balanced design for control and ease of use.
ERGONOMIC NON-SLIP GRIP: For comfort and control during use.
COMPACT DESIGN: BACKED BY AMTECH S Backed by Amtech’s 3-year guarantee with UK-based aftercare.
description: Product Description The Amtech stubby hammer features a compact design, magnetic head, and cushion grip for comfortable handling, making this a firm favourite for any toolbox and discerning DIY enthusiast. Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for a variety of DIY tasks and projects. Great value prices are coupled with a standard 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Hammer See more
